feature: Dashboard Home Data Wiring - Verification & Testing
workflow_rationale: Investigation revealed components, hooks, and API endpoints already exist and are connected. This is a verification and testing task, not new implementation. Simple workflow is appropriate for single-service verification tasks.

phases.name: Data Flow Verification
phases.description: Verify all three dashboard components fetch and display real database data through existing REST API endpoints

subtasks.description: Verify GEO Score Trend component displays live data from /api/analytics/unified-score

checks: GEO Score Trend chart renders with data points
Historical trend line shows database values

subtasks.notes: Verified GEO Score Trend data flow: Component uses useUnifiedScore hook → Hook calls /api/analytics/unified-score → API queries PostgreSQL via Drizzle. Loading states, empty states, and error handling all implemented. No TypeScript errors. Note: Dashboard uses ScoreTrend (unified SEO+GEO+AEO) which uses same API.

subtasks.description: Verify Prioritized Recommendations component displays live data from /api/recommendations

checks: Items are sorted by priority (critical > high > medium > low)
Zero-state message shows when no recommendations

subtasks.notes: Component already uses useRecommendations hook. Verify sorting and data display.

subtasks.description: Verify Citation Velocity Chart component displays live data from /api/monitor/citations

checks: Citation Velocity chart renders with trend data
Time series shows database citation counts

subtasks.notes: Component already uses useCitations hook. Verify chart rendering with API data.

phases.name: Error Handling & Edge Cases
phases.description: Verify robust error handling, loading states, and edge cases for all dashboard components

subtasks.description: Verify loading states and error handling for all three components

verification.instructions: Test: 1) Loading states appear during data fetch, 2) API errors display user-friendly messages, 3) Components handle empty data gracefully, 4) Network timeouts are handled

subtasks.notes: Components should already have loading/error states from hooks. Verify and enhance if needed.

subtasks.description: Test edge cases: no data, partial data, zero recommendations

verification.instructions: Test scenarios: 1) Brand with no historical data shows 'No data available', 2) Partial data renders correctly, 3) Zero recommendations shows positive message, 4) Large datasets don't crash UI

subtasks.notes: Edge case handling may need additions to components.

phases.name: Performance Verification
phases.description: Verify dashboard loads within 2-second performance constraint with all data displayed

subtasks.description: Measure dashboard load time and optimize if needed

verification.instructions: Use Chrome DevTools Performance tab: 1) Record page load from navigation, 2) Measure time until all three components show data, 3) Verify ≤ 2 seconds total, 4) Check that API calls are parallelized, not sequential

subtasks.notes: API endpoints already use database queries. Check if caching or query optimization is needed.

subtasks.description: Verify API response times and optimize database queries if needed

verification.expected: Each endpoint responds in < 500ms with database data

subtasks.notes: API routes already use Drizzle ORM for database queries. Test with sample data.

phases.name: Automated Testing
phases.description: Add or update tests for dashboard components and API endpoints

subtasks.description: Add/update unit tests for dashboard components
subtasks.notes: Use @testing-library/react to test component rendering with mocked API responses.

subtasks.description: Add E2E test for dashboard page data loading

verification.expected: E2E test passes: dashboard loads, all components display data

subtasks.notes: Playwright test to verify full dashboard flow with real API calls.

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1-verification and work on different aspects

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Minimal - simple verification workflow, sequential testing preferred

acceptance_criteria: All three dashboard components display real database data
New component tests added and passing
No console errors during dashboard load
Loading and error states work correctly

verification_steps.name: E2E Dashboard Load Test
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Dashboard loads with all data within 2 seconds

verification_steps.name: Browser Verification
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Visit http://localhost:3000/dashboard - all components show data, no errors

verification_steps.name: Performance Check
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Dashboard loads in ≤ 2 seconds from navigation start

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk verification task. Components and APIs already exist. Main focus is testing and validation.

checks: GEO Score Trend chart renders with data
